overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a foggy, storm-wracked urban street. The player character moves from a covered walkway through palm-lined sidewalks, crosses a neon-lit intersection, and continues through moderate pedestrian traffic in a dystopian cityscape with heavy atmospheric fog and swaying palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open foggy street

events.description: exits covered walkway into foggy open street with palm trees visible ahead
ambient light shifts from enclosed artificial to fog-diffused street lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway and emerging into the foggy street

entered.detail: transparent glass and metal roof structure of the covered walkway
smooth dark concrete wall of adjacent building
short black posts lining the edge of the walkway
tall palm trees swaying in the wind at the street entrance
tall street lamp emitting bright white light through fog

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered glass walkway with a concrete building wall on the left. The camera moves forward, passing metal bollards, and emerges into a foggy open street. Palm trees and street lamps become visible through the thick fog as the lighting shifts from enclosed artificial to diffused outdoor street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy palm-lined urban street with large advertisement

events.description: large illuminated digital billboard reading 'IT'S BIG' comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the foggy sidewalk passing swaying palm trees and approaching a large digital billboard

entered.detail: large vertical digital advertisement screen displaying 'IT'S BIG' with a beverage can image
tall modern building with illuminated windows visible through fog

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wide foggy street lined with palm trees swaying in the storm wind. A large digital billboard emerges on the right side displaying an advertisement. The street is sparsely populated with pedestrians and occasional vehicles passing through the fog. Modern building facades are visible in the distance through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and traffic control

events.description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk with traffic lights and vehicles waiting
slight turn to navigate through moderate pedestrian traffic at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at an intersection while navigating through groups of pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sports car waiting at the intersection with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: tall metal pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
yellow and white painted zebra crossing markings on the asphalt
multiple large digital screens mounted on building facade displaying advertisements
low concrete barrier with metal railings separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a busy urban intersection with moderate pedestrian density. The camera crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, passing a traffic light pole. A futuristic red sports car waits at the intersection. Digital advertisement screens illuminate the left side of the street while concrete barricades line the right. The fog continues to obscure distant buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban sidewalk with street structures and graffiti

events.description: approaching a more open plaza area with overhead pedestrian bridge structure becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk passing pedestrians and street barricades while approaching an open plaza

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket and shorts walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete wall with white graffiti tags and street art
elevated walkway structure spanning across the street ahead
illuminated pink and blue neon signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: Continuing along a busy sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction. The left side features a concrete wall with graffiti, while the right side has concrete barricades with metal railings. Palm trees line the street, swaying in the wind. Ahead, an overhead pedestrian bridge structure becomes visible through the fog, with neon signs illuminating the distant buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban corridor into a sprawling, storm-swept dystopian intersection. It begins under a covered glass walkway beside a concrete wall, moving past metal bollards before emerging into a thick fog where palm trees and street lamps gradually materialize. As the camera advances along the wide, wind-blown street, a large digital billboard appears through the haze, guiding the path toward a busy urban intersection. The scene then opens into a crowded crosswalk where the camera passes a futuristic red sports car and glowing advertisement screens, while the fog continues to shroud the distant skyline. Finally, the movement continues along a graffiti-lined sidewalk and concrete barricades, heading toward an overhead pedestrian bridge illuminated by distant neon signs.
